findings.description: Token refresh math is wrong — multiplies absolute timestamp by 0.8 instead of computing 80% of TTL elapsed
DeploymentProgressEvent has no clusterId field — multi-cluster progress events indistinguishable
deployments.list queries only first cluster, not all clusters — breaks multi-cluster
Informer leak on partial start failure — if 2nd informer.start() throws, 1st is never stopped
Duplicate parseCpuToNano / parseMemoryToBytes helpers in metrics.ts and cluster-watch-manager.ts
PodEvent.clusterId and MetricsEvent.clusterId are optional in type but always set by ClusterWatchManager
Leftover loadFromDefault() in deprecated functions — should log warning pointing to clusterClientPool
restart/scale mutations have no clusterId input — always operate on first cluster
Hardcoded 2000ms poll interval in deprecated streamLogs
